.github/workflows/build.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Java version property to 21 for the project.

spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-data-jpa-emb.general_idea: Remove explicit JUnit 4 dependency as it is no longer needed or compatible with the new test stack.

spring-boot-read-properties/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Validation API dependency to support Bean Validation in Spring Boot 3.x.

spring-data-jdbc/pom.xml.general_idea: Exclude JUnit 4 from TestNG to prevent conflicts with JUnit 5 or other test runners.
spring-data-jdbc/pom.xml.why_exists: TestNG 7.3.0 transitively depends on JUnit 4, which can cause classpath conflicts or test execution failures in modern Spring Boot projects using JUnit 5.

spring-webflux-webclient/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for creating Path instances.
Remove unused import for java.nio.file.Paths after switching to Path.of().

spring-webflux-webclient/src/main/resour.general_idea: Comment out deprecated Spring Boot banner image configuration properties.
spring-webflux-webclient/src/main/resour.before:
spring:
 banner:
   image:
     width: 50
     height: 15
     margin: 10
     invert: true
spring-webflux-webclient/src/main/resour.after:
# This property is deprecated: Support for image banners has been removed.
     # width: 50
